tasks.title: Build MVP dashboard page
tasks.summary: Replace the placeholder dashboard with operating cards for projects, RFQs, suppliers, tenders, and next actions.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard route shows real app data where available
Cards link to working modules
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Build quote comparison UI
tasks.summary: Add a simple manual quote comparison page or panel connected to POST /api/v1/quotes/compare.
acceptance_criteria: User can enter supplier, scope, amount, and selected flag
UI displays lowest total, selected total, and delta
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Upgrade Project Workspace into command center
tasks.summary: Make one project record the hub for tender info, documents, drawings, RFQs, suppliers, quotes, estimate, schedule, municipality requirements, bid package, and activity.
acceptance_criteria: Project detail shows command-center action cards
Project detail links to RFQs, documents, suppliers, quotes, and estimating
Project detail provides next practical step guidance

tasks.title: Add project-scoped module links
tasks.summary: Pass project context from Project Workspace into RFQs, documents, quotes, and estimating using project query parameters or route state so users stay inside one bid workspace.
acceptance_criteria: Command Center links include selected project id where useful
RFQ Builder can preselect or display selected project context
Documents and estimating pages can show selected project context
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Complete estimating UI fields
tasks.summary: Add disposal, vendor quote, risk probability, and category breakdown to the Estimating page.
acceptance_criteria: Estimate payload supports disposal inputs
Estimate payload supports vendor quote inputs
Summary shows category breakdown
Workbook download remains functional

tasks.title: Prepare MVP deployment
tasks.summary: Add deployment docs and environment checklist for running frontend, backend, and Postgres in production.
acceptance_criteria: Production environment variables documented
Backend deployment steps documented
Frontend deployment steps documented
